# ~~getRegisteredToolNames()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function getRegisteredToolNames(server: McpServer): string[];
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility.ts:98](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility.ts#L98)

Returns the names of all registered tools on an [McpServer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk).

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type                                                                  | Description                                                                                     |
| --------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `server`  | [`McpServer`](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) | The [McpServer](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk) instance to introspect. |

## Returns

`string`\[]

An array of tool name strings.

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Use `tools/list`
via the MCP protocol instead.

## Remarks

Convenience wrapper that calls [getRegisteredTools](getRegisteredTools.md) and
returns `Object.keys` of the resulting record.
